demoScenarios.title: AI research report acceptance
demoScenarios.objective: Decide whether an AI-assisted research report is ready for client acceptance.
demoScenarios.input: A public-safe summary of a research deliverable and its evidence categories.

demoScenarios.title: Automation delivery review
demoScenarios.audience: AI automation teams and operations leaders
demoScenarios.objective: Confirm that an automation milestone has evidence, rollback notes, and human approval.
demoScenarios.input: A public-safe milestone description, acceptance checklist, and proof categories.

demoScenarios.title: Grant milestone verification
demoScenarios.audience: Grant programs, DAOs, foundations, public-good funders
demoScenarios.objective: Evaluate whether a milestone package is review-ready before funds or recognition decisions.
demoScenarios.input: Public-safe milestone summary, deliverable list, and proof pointers.

demoScenarios.title: AI vendor proof mission
demoScenarios.objective: Compare vendor claims against evidence categories before procurement decisions.
demoScenarios.input: Public-safe vendor claim list and evidence categories.
